description_long: This is a sleek, modern electric sedan with a streamlined body and a panoramic black glass roof. The car features flush door handles, large alloy wheels, and a smooth, aerodynamic profile with minimal ornamentation. The front end is characterized by a low, sculpted hood and a distinctive emblem at the center of the grille area, flanked by narrow, angular headlights. The rear showcases a subtle integrated spoiler, wraparound taillights, and a clean trunk design with no visible exhaust pipes, emphasizing its electric nature. The windows are tinted, and the overall finish is a glossy silver with black accents. The design cues and proportions suggest a luxury electric vehicle, likely from a well-known manufacturer.
description: A silver luxury electric sedan with a panoramic black roof, flush handles, and large alloy wheels. It features a streamlined, aerodynamic design with distinctive front and rear emblems.
description_view_0: Side view showing the car's elongated profile, flush door handles, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wraparound taillights, subtle spoiler, and clean trunk with no visible exhaust.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the elongated profile and design symmetry, with visible door and wheel details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the sculpted hood, narrow headlights, and prominent emblem at the grille area.
attribute_badging_or_emblem: Tesla T emblem on front grille
Tesla T emblem on rear trunk
